name: Sistem Master Linen menampilkan daftar linen dan opsi kelola
description: Admin dapat membuka kategori Sistem, masuk ke tab Master Linen, dan melihat daftar linen, serta mencoba menambahkan data baru.

planSteps.description: Login as admin using credentials 'admin@email.com' and 'admin' if presented with a login page
Click on the 'Sistem' menu item in the navigation sidebar
Click on the 'Master Linen' tab within the Sistem category
Verify the Master Linen page is displayed, showing a table of linen data and an Add or Tambah button
